description: This file defines a utility object SplitUtils that provides a function to split a string into tokens based on spaces and returns them as a LinkedList.

classes.name: SplitUtils
classes.description: A utility object containing functions for splitting strings into tokens.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits the input string into tokens separated by spaces and returns a LinkedList of tokens.

methods.name: addIfValid
methods.description: Adds a token to the list if the token is valid (not empty).

methods.name: isTokenValid
methods.description: Checks if a token is valid, i.e., not empty.
